message:
Discover account IDs from chats, not just /v1/accounts

iMessage has chats but its account isn't listed in /v1/accounts.
Now scans the global chat list for account IDs and merges with
/v1/accounts to ensure all accounts are backfilled and polled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
